title: Learn Binary Search with Visualizer | JavaScript
description:
Binary Search is a searching technique which works on the Divide and Conquer approach. It is used to search for any element in a sorted array. Compared with linear, binary search is much faster with a Time Complexity of O(logN)

Steps:
BASE CONDITION: If starting index is greater than ending index return false.
Compute the middle index.
Compare the middle element with number x. If equal return true.
If greater, call the same function with ending index = middle-1 and repeat step 1.
If smaller, call the same function with starting index = middle+1 and repeat step 1.

Use the visualizer:
https://pythontutor.com/render.html#mode=display

Source code:
https://github.com/ortoniKC/JS_DS_ALGO

(https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/binary-search-in-javascript/#:~:text=Binary%20Search%20is%20a%20searching,O(N)%20time%20complexity.)
